name: Broiled Cheddar-Olive
recipeInstructions:
1. Hard cook the eggs and slice them into a medium-sized bowl.
2. Grate the Cheddar cheese and add it to the bowl with the sliced eggs.
3. Add the chopped olives, green bell pepper, and onion to the mixture.
4. In a small cup or bowl, blend together 2 tbsp catsup, 2 tsp mayonnaise, 2 tsp prepared mustard, 1/4 tsp marjoram, 1/8 tsp oregano, 1/8 tsp salt, and pinch of pepper.
5. Mix the blended ingredients with the cheese mixture in a separate bowl.
6. Preheat the oven to broil setting.
7. Split the buns (if not already split) using a sharp knife.
8. Place the buns on the broiler rack, cut sides up, about 2 inches from the heat source and broil until golden brown.
9. Remove the buns from the oven and spread butter evenly over each side of the bun.
10. Spread about 1/8 of the Cheddar mixture onto the buttered side of each bun.
11. Return the sandwiches to the broiler with the tops of the sandwiches 3-inches from the heat source.
12. Broil until the cheese is bubbly, then remove from oven and serve immediately.
